data.description:
MAGITECH

Also: Engineering, Golemcraft, Robotics.

This invention type grants a variety of different benefits.

MAGITECH OVERRIDE (BASIC)

Add the @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.aPfawWXZqKuHAAqj]{Magitech Override} feature to your character sheet.

During a conflict, you may use an action and spend 10 Mind Points to choose a construct or elemental enemy you can see that does not possess independent intelligence and is suffering from one or more status effects. If you do so, that enemy recovers from all status effects, then the Game Master reveals its entire profile and you may force it to immediately perform an action of your choice; during that action, the creature is treated as an ally of your group.

MAGICANNON (ADVANCED)

Add the @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.consumables.Item.AbazTRyaMTW4ouhx]{Magicannon (Item)} to your character sheet.

You may perform the Inventory action and spend 2 Inventory Points to create a magicannon (see below) and destroy any magicannon you previously created. If you do so and both your hand slots are empty, you may immediately equip the newly created magicannon and perform a free attack with it. Whenever you create a magicannon, choose what type of damage it deals among air, bolt, earth, fire, ice, or physical.

WEAPON

ACCURACY

DAMAGE

Magicannon

【DEX + INS】 +1

【HR + 10】

Firearm • Two-handed • Ranged • Cannot have Qualities.

MAGISPHERES (SUPERIOR)

Add three @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.consumables.Item.7dUU12f8IHa2tESo]{Magisphere (Superior)} to your character sheet.

You develop a magisphere for each of three spells from among those found in the Elementalist, Entropist, and Spiritist lists; these spells may come from the same list or from different lists (this does not count as “learning” or “knowing” these spells).

You develop a new magisphere upon reaching level 20, and another upon reaching level 40 (the same applies if you already reached those levels).

You may perform the Inventory action and spend 2 Inventory Points to perform the Spell action for free, casting one of the spells you have developed a magisphere for. The spell follows the normal rules (including MP costs and Magic Checks).

For spell breakdown, refer to: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.U0zSlmaK8PDCjMlV]{Spell Rules} or see Core Rulebook, page 114.

For spell lists, refer to:

  • Elementalist. @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.hK8r8lsQNaknSqdq.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{ELEMENTALIST SPELL LIST} or see Core Rulebook, page 188.

  • Entropist. @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.jZeTJrK0mFsRyz8S.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{ENTROPIST SPELL LIST} or see Core Rulebook, page 192.

  • Spiritist. @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.L65ajg6cmHEk3zAP.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{SPIRITIST SPELL LIST} or see Core Rulebook, page 208.
